title: Bothriocline milanjiensis
taxonomy: Bothriocline milanjiensis is classified in the following way: it belongs to the kingdom Plantae, the phylum Magnoliophyta, the class Magnoliopsida, the order Asterales, the family Asteraceae, the subfamily Cichorioideae, the tribe Senecioneae, and the genus Bothriocline. Bothriocline milanjiensis is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. It is native to the tropical regions of Africa. The classification is based on its morphological characteristics and genetic makeup. By understanding its classification, we can gain insights into the evolutionary history and relationships of Bothriocline milanjiensis.
